moments.title: Spain lifts the World Cup trophy!
moments.blurb: Spain defeated defending champions Argentina 1-0 in extra time at the New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026, to win their second FIFA World Cup title.

angles.name: World Cup Reaction
angles.copy: The dust has settled on the FIFA World Cup 2026! Spain are champions after a nail-biting final against Argentina. What a tournament it was!

angles.name: Final Thoughts
angles.copy: Did you see the World Cup final on Sunday? Spain took the trophy in a thrilling match against Argentina. Where does this rank in World Cup history for you?

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 in full swing
moments.blurb: The sixth edition of The Hundred cricket tournament, featuring both men's and women's competitions, kicked off on July 21st and runs until August 16th, with matches happening across the UK this week.

angles.name: Hundred Kicks Off
angles.copy: The Hundred is back and matches are firing up across the country! Who are you backing to win this year's men's and women's competitions?

angles.name: Cricket Action
angles.copy: Cricket fans, The Hundred 2026 is well underway! Catch all the action this week as teams battle it out for glory. Any big upsets so far?

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, Southport, concluded on July 19, 2026, with Ryan Fox winning by one stroke.

angles.name: Golf Wrap-up
angles.copy: What a weekend of golf! The Open Championship wrapped up on Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Congratulations to Ryan Fox on a fantastic win!

angles.name: Claret Jug
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has a new home! The Open Championship 2026 delivered incredible drama. Did you catch the final rounds?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off tomorrow!
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Latitude Countdown
angles.copy: Festival season is in full swing and Latitude kicks off tomorrow in Suffolk! Who's heading to Henham Park for a weekend of music and arts?

angles.name: Get Ready Latitude
angles.copy: Get ready, Latitude Festival is almost here! From July 23rd-26th, Henham Park will be buzzing. What acts are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Truck Festival opens its gates tomorrow
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's longest-running independent music festival, takes place from July 23-26, 2026, at Hill Farm, Steventon.

angles.name: Truck Festival Tomorrow
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back! The Oxfordshire favourite starts tomorrow. Who's making the trip to Hill Farm this weekend?

angles.name: Oxfordshire Festival
angles.copy: Your weekend plans sorted? Truck Festival kicks off on July 23rd! Expect great music and good vibes.

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival next week
moments.blurb: Scotland's Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival runs from July 30 - August 1, 2026, at the Belladrum Estate, featuring James, The Human League, and Callum Beattie.

angles.name: Belladrum Approaches
angles.copy: Heading to the Highlands next week? Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival is almost here, with James and The Human League headlining!

angles.name: Tartan Heart Vibes
angles.copy: Belladrum's calling! Scotland's beloved festival kicks off on July 30th. Who's excited for three days of music and community?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival coming up!
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30 - August 2, 2026, with headliners like The Libertines, Reytons, and Two Door Cinema Club.

angles.name: Y-Not Excitement
angles.copy: Derbyshire, get ready! Y-Not Festival is just around the corner, starting July 30th. The Libertines, Reytons, and Two Door Cinema Club are playing!

angles.name: Peak District Party
angles.copy: Counting down to Y-Not Festival? The Peak District will be alive with music from July 30th. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset next week
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset runs from July 30 - August 2, 2026, at Lulworth Castle, offering a family-friendly festival experience.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Family festival fun incoming! Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off next week at Lulworth Castle. Who's packing their bags for a weekend of adventure?

angles.name: Lulworth Castle
angles.copy: Only a week until Camp Bestival Dorset! Get ready for four days of music, activities, and good times from July 30th.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and successful solo artist, turns 79 today.

angles.name: Henley's 79th
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles, who turns 79 today! What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, his voice is unmistakable. What's your top Henley song?

moments.title: Guitar legend Slash turns 61 tomorrow!
moments.blurb: Saul 'Slash' Hudson, the iconic guitarist of Guns N' Roses, celebrates his 61st birthday tomorrow, July 23rd.

angles.name: Slash's Birthday Eve
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the birthday of a true guitar hero, Slash! The Guns N' Roses legend turns 61. What's his most iconic riff?

angles.name: GNR Legend
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to Slash! The top hat, the Gibson, the riffs! What's your favourite GNR track featuring his unmistakable sound?

moments.title: Happy Birthday to J.Lo!
moments.blurb: Superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's 57th
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Friday. What's your go-to J.Lo anthem to get the party started?

angles.name: Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! From music to movies, she truly does it all. Which of her hits is your favourite?

moments.title: Rolling Stones icon Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Mick's 83rd
angles.copy: Still rolling after all these years! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones track to celebrate the rock 'n' roll legend?

angles.name: Stones Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on Sunday! The energy, the moves, the voice – what an icon!

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Pete Yorn!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Pete Yorn celebrates his 52nd birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Pete Yorn's 52nd
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 52nd Birthday to singer-songwriter Pete Yorn this Monday! What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: Indie Rock Talent
angles.copy: Celebrate Pete Yorn's 52nd Birthday on Monday! A true indie-rock talent. What song of his is always on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Soulja Boy!
moments.blurb: Rapper and producer Soulja Boy, known for hits like 'Crank That (Soulja Boy)', turns 36 on July 28th.

angles.name: Soulja Boy's 36th
angles.copy: Crank That! Soulja Boy turns 36 this Tuesday. What's your favourite track from the trailblazing artist?

angles.name: Crank That
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to Soulja Boy on Tuesday! Remember when 'Crank That' took over the world? Still a banger!

moments.title: Celebrate Paul Anka's 85th Birthday!
moments.blurb: Legendary singer, songwriter, and actor Paul Anka will turn 85 on July 30th.

angles.name: Anka's 85th
angles.copy: A true legend turns 85 this Thursday! Happy Birthday to the incredible Paul Anka. What's your favourite classic from him?

angles.name: Timeless Songwriter
angles.copy: From 'Diana' to 'My Way', Paul Anka's songwriting is timeless. Wishing him a very Happy 85th Birthday on Thursday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday to Fatboy Slim!
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the iconic DJ and producer, turns 63 on July 31st.

angles.name: Fatboy's 63rd
angles.copy: Right here, right now! Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim this Friday. What's your favourite floor-filler from him?

angles.name: Norman Cook
angles.copy: Wishing Norman Cook a very Happy 63rd Birthday on Friday! Fatboy Slim has given us so many unforgettable dance anthems. Which one gets you moving?

moments.title: Def Leppard's Joe Elliott turns 67!
moments.blurb: Joe Elliott, the lead singer of legendary rock band Def Leppard, celebrates his 67th birthday on August 1st.

angles.name: Joe Elliott's 67th
angles.copy: Pour some sugar on him! Def Leppard's Joe Elliott turns 67 this Saturday. What's your favourite power ballad or rock anthem from the band?

angles.name: Def Leppard frontman
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Joe Elliott on Saturday! The voice of Def Leppard still rocking after all these years. What's your top track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Wes Borland!
moments.blurb: Wes Borland, guitarist for nu-metal band Limp Bizkit, turns 51 on August 2nd.

angles.name: Wes Borland's 51st
angles.copy: Break Stuff! Limp Bizkit's distinctive guitarist Wes Borland turns 51 this Sunday. What's your favourite Limp Bizkit track?

angles.name: Limp Bizkit Guitarist
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 51st Birthday to Wes Borland on Sunday! The unique style and sound he brings to Limp Bizkit is unmistakable.

moments.title: Summer Holidays are in full swing!
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are ongoing across the UK, with most schools breaking up in July and returning in late August/early September.

angles.name: Kids Off School
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are well underway across the UK! What are your plans for keeping the kids entertained this week?

angles.name: Summer Break Fun
angles.copy: Summer holidays are here! Whether you're staying local or heading off on an adventure, we hope you're making the most of the break.
